title: botryolotus griffithii
intro: Botryolotus griffithii is a plant species that belongs to the family Apiaceae and is also known as Griffth's celery or Griffith's Umbellifer. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Botryolotus griffithii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and support the digestive system. Botryolotus griffithii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including respiratory issues and skin conditions.
